$comment: MITRE ATT&CK Enterprise catalogue used by the Sentinel Documenter MITRE coverage section (25-mitre-coverage.md) and the gap engine (SENT-006 MITRE-tactic-coverage). Tactics carry both shortname (kebab, STIX canonical) and sentinelShortName (PascalCase, what Sentinel rule tactics[] arrays return). Techniques carry tacticsSentinel as the PascalCase counterpart. Regenerated from the upstream STIX bundle at mitre-attack/attack-stix-data; bump the version field when MITRE realigns.
license: MITRE ATT&CK content is licensed under CC BY 4.0 (https://attack.mitre.org/resources/legal-and-branding/terms-of-use/)
